## Example

```graphql
{
  allCommitteeMemberships(
    filter: { thomasId: { equalTo: "SSEG" } }
    orderBy: RANK_ASC
  ) {
    nodes {
      title
      party
      rank
      legislatorByBioguideId {
        officialFull
      }
    }
  }
}
```
